description: Canonical maze definition. All 5 language implementations must produce identical wall and pellet layouts.

walls.border: All cells where x=0, x=39, y=0, or y=29

horizontal_rows.description: Horizontal wall at row 10, columns 5-14 inclusive
Horizontal wall at row 20, columns 5-14 inclusive

vertical_columns.description: Vertical wall at column 20, rows 5-24 inclusive

pellets.rule: All non-wall tiles except Pacman start position (5,5)
